findings.summary: prometheus + searxng profile-gated third-party images were tag-pinned, not digest-pinned (unlike postgres/nats/ollama tag@sha256).
findings.resolution: Digest-pinned both images as tag@sha256 in the SST source + deploy/contract.yaml; extended internal/deploy/external_images_contract_test.go with a digest-pin lock for both ${VAR}-substituted entries (closes the Check-3 byte-match gap).
findings.digestMethod: index/manifest-list digest via `docker buildx imagetools inspect <tag>` (verified: nats:2.10-alpine reproduces its committed digest b83efabe... exactly; resolved twice, stable)

findings.summary: deploy/compose.deploy.yml app + prometheus image refs use plain ${VAR} not ${VAR:?} fail-loud (code F-04); searxng:414 already fail-loud.
findings.resolution: Converted the three image refs to the ${VAR:?...} fail-loud form (matches searxng): smackerel-core -> ${SMACKEREL_CORE_IMAGE:?SMACKEREL_CORE_IMAGE must be set by the deploy adapter at apply}, smackerel-ml -> ${SMACKEREL_ML_IMAGE:?...}, prometheus -> ${PROMETHEUS_IMAGE:?PROMETHEUS_IMAGE must be set when the monitoring profile is enabled}. Only the guard changed, not the resolved value. KEPT (no revert): no contract test byte-matches these compose image strings -- external_images_contract_test.go Check 3 skips ${...} images and its digest-pin lock reads deploy/contract.yaml; compose_contract_test.go only checks ports/network_mode; dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go scans docker-compose.yml and only matches the forbidden :- form. Validated: config generate exit 0; focused Compose|ConfigSync|ExternalImages suite green (internal/deploy ok, internal/config ok; go test ./... finished OK).

findings.summary: Concurrent ollama envelope SUM guard (validateModelEnvelopes) is conditional by design; needs an operator-guidance breadcrumb only (code F-03).
findings.resolution: Not a bug (conditional by design). Added an operator breadcrumb to docs/Deployment.md Go-Live Readiness Checklist section 4 (--profile ollama): the validateModelEnvelopes co-residence OOM guard is enforced only while OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE keeps the interactive hot-path models resident (-1 or >=10m); keep keep-alive resident on home-lab. Minimal, sits next to the existing validateModelEnvelopes + ollama ps/OOM checklist items.

findings.summary: _spec-review-report.md stale (omits OPS-003/004); specs 087/088 carry stale CI-as-producer narrative; spec 082 releaseTrain=next vs MVP framing (spec-review F3/F4/F5).
findings.resolution: FIXED 2026-06-30 by bubbles.spec-review (read-only spec-review-to-doc; no spec state.json mutated). Added a new 2026-06-30 readiness-sweep layer at the top of specs/_spec-review-report.md (append-only, newest-on-top): F3 covers the previously-omitted OPS-003 (SUPERSEDED) + OPS-004 (CURRENT) home-lab handoff packets and records the 2026-06-30 sweep remediation (smackerel SF-1/SF-2/SF-3 + docs/Upkeep_Runbook reconcile; knb-side KF-1..KF-5 referenced, not imported) discharging the prior F1 local-operator-path-readiness risk; F4 documents why spec 082 carries releaseTrain=next (next-train hardening batch whose in-repo scopes benefit MVP but are independent of the mvp-train feature set; retag is bubbles.train's call, not required for go-live; 082 state.json NOT edited); F5 dispositions the 087/088 CI-as-producer narrative as SUPERSEDED by OPS-004 + non-gating for MVP, recommending 087/088 reconcile their own ci/deploy narrative on next unblock (owner bubbles.devops/bubbles.docs; 087/088 state.json NOT edited). No runtime impact.

outOfScope.note: /api/capture durability — already FIXED + committed under its own bug packet; not re-addressed here.

validation.result: PASS (exit 0); generated config/generated/dev.env carries PROMETHEUS_IMAGE + SEARXNG_IMAGE with the @sha256 digests; config/generated is gitignored (no committed drift)
PASS — ok github.com/smackerel/smackerel/internal/deploy 0.120s (overall exit 0); the new prometheus+searxng digest-pin lock passes

validation.result: PASS (exit 0); generated config/generated/dev.env, nats.conf, prometheus.yml; config-validate dev.env.tmp OK. The SF-2 ${VAR:?...} guard change does not affect config generation.

validation.result: PASS — internal/deploy ok 0.153s, internal/config ok 0.038s; '[go-unit] go test ./... finished OK' (exit 0). No lockstep test compares compose image strings byte-for-byte (external_images Check 3 skips ${...} images; digest-pin lock reads deploy/contract.yaml). SF-2 KEPT, no revert.
Deferred to the final sweep — the full check is heavy; the focused Compose|ConfigSync|ExternalImages suite + config generate already prove SF-1/SF-2/SF-3. SF-3 is docs-only (no code impact).

executionHistory.summary: Resolved the LIVE index/manifest-list digests for the two profile-gated third-party images via `docker buildx imagetools inspect` (method confirmed by nats:2.10-alpine reproducing its committed b83efabe... pin exactly). Digest-pinned prometheus (sha256:2659f4c2...) and searxng (sha256:f134249d...) as tag@sha256 in the SST (config/smackerel.yaml::monitoring.prometheus.image, ::assistant.open_knowledge.searxng.image) and deploy/contract.yaml::externalImages, matching the postgres/nats/ollama format. Extended internal/deploy/external_images_contract_test.go: upgraded the prometheus smoke check to a digest-pin lock and added a matching searxng lock so both ${VAR}-substituted entries are byte-matched against their digest-pinned value (Check-3 byte-match intentionally skips ${...} images; this closes that gap = TASK 2). Validated: config generate exit 0 (digests flow into generated dev.env), focused ExternalImages Go test green (internal/deploy ok). SF-2..SF-4 recorded as follow-on dispositions with file:line/severity/owner; no code change beyond SF-1. No git commit/push, no build/deploy/docker/promote run. Left UNCOMMITTED for the orchestrator.

SF-2 + SF-3 hardening/doc follow-ons. SF-2: converted deploy/compose.deploy.yml smackerel-core/smackerel-ml/prometheus image refs from plain ${VAR} to the ${VAR:?...} fail-loud form (matching searxng + smackerel-no-defaults); only the guard changed, not the resolved value. Confirmed no lockstep test byte-matches the compose image strings (external_images_contract_test.go Check 3 skips ${...} images; its digest-pin lock reads deploy/contract.yaml; compose_contract_test.go checks only ports/network_mode; dev_compose_default_fallback_test.go scans docker-compose.yml and only matches the :- form) so SF-2 is KEPT, no revert. SF-3: added an operator breadcrumb to docs/Deployment.md Go-Live Readiness Checklist section 4 (--profile ollama) noting the validateModelEnvelopes co-residence OOM guard is enforced only while OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE keeps interactive models resident; keep keep-alive resident (-1 or >=10m) on home-lab. Validated: config generate exit 0; focused Compose|ConfigSync|ExternalImages suite green (internal/deploy ok 0.153s, internal/config ok 0.038s; go test ./... finished OK). Packet stays in_progress (SF-4 doc refresh still open, owned by bubbles.releases). No git commit/push, no build/deploy/docker/promote run. Left UNCOMMITTED for the orchestrator.

SF-4 (stale spec/review docs) doc refresh + OPS-005 close-out. Read-only spec-review-to-doc; no spec state.json mutated. Added a new 2026-06-30 readiness-sweep layer at the top of specs/_spec-review-report.md (append-only, newest-on-top): F3 covers the previously-omitted OPS-003 (SUPERSEDED) + OPS-004 (CURRENT) home-lab handoff packets and records the 2026-06-30 sweep remediation (smackerel SF-1/SF-2/SF-3 + docs/Upkeep_Runbook reconcile; the sibling knb-side OPS-003 sweep KF-1..KF-5 referenced, not imported) discharging the prior F1 local-operator-path-readiness risk; F4 documents spec 082's releaseTrain=next rationale (next-train hardening batch whose in-repo scopes benefit MVP but are independent of the mvp-train feature set; retag is bubbles.train's call, not required for go-live; 082 state.json NOT edited); F5 dispositions the 087/088 CI-as-producer narrative as SUPERSEDED by OPS-004 + non-gating for MVP with a next-unblock reconcile recommendation (owner bubbles.devops/bubbles.docs; 087/088 state.json NOT edited). With SF-1..SF-4 all FIXED the packet transitions to done. BUG-069-003's shared live-stack E2E (with BUG-069-002) is out of scope here and remains in_progress under its own bug packet (folded into the final go-live validation sweep). No git commit/push run; report + this packet left UNCOMMITTED for the orchestrator.
